canonical_core.requested_outcome: Finish #1374 on PR #1379 by making the AW-side contract-owned generated-command test replacement complete, explicit, and test-backed after rebasing onto master.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not silently leave #1374 as a partial PR. Convert stable generated-command behavior where a stable owner exists; keep ordinary tests only under the issue's explicit keep criteria. Do not claim command-generation#9 is complete.

canonical_core.next_action: Validate the strengthened inventory and update PR #1379 to honestly close #1374.
